{{Quote|I met the old swashbuckler once as a drifting waif. By the time he had decided to hang up his vibroblade and retire at Zirtran's Anchor, he and his crew made quite a name for themselves.|[[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]]|<ref name="Zirtran's Anchor (article)">{{JournalCite|5|Zirtran's Anchor (article)}}</ref>}}
The [[Dread Pirate]] '''Mendel Cutter''' was a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the ''[[Rusted Cutlass]]''. Upon retirement, [[Gender/Legends|he]] settled at [[Zirtran's Anchor/Legends|''Zirtran's Anchor'']] attaching his [[Starship/Legends|ship]] permanently to the [[Space station/Legends|space station]]. When the station reappeared after its mysterious disappearance, Cutter's ship was gone, leading many people to believe that he had escaped the catastrophe.
